feed.title: AO3 - Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne (Filtered)
feed.subtitle: Latest works for Clark Kent/Bruce Wayne on Archive of Our Own [English, No ABO]

entry.title: Man of Tomorrow, Knight of Now
entry.summary:
Author: acatcam

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 13,874Chapters: 7/?Kudos: 170

Summary: Clark Kent has spent decades saving the world - long enough to believe he’s seen it all. Until Gotham’s new vigilante catches his attention. Investigating the “Batman” should’ve been simple: another story for the Daily Planet, another mystery unraveled. But the deeper he looks, the clearer it becomes that Gotham’s masked knight isn’t just a mystery. He’s Bruce Wayne - young, brilliant, and carrying the kind of loneliness Clark remembers all too well. What begins as curiosity turns into something else when Bruce’s excuses for lingering around Metropolis start pointing towards one thing. Or: an older Superman meets a younger Batman, and they learn that sometimes even heroes need saving - and that not every kind of heat comes from battle

entry.title: The Raven Roosts in the Cornflower Blue
entry.summary:
Author: Aurora2Sunset

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 56,251Chapters: 11/?Kudos: 295

Summary: Someone new moved to Smallville, in the house on the other side of the Kent farm. Clark meets the new kid, Bruce Wayne, and his first impression isn't great. He thinks that Bruce is spoiled and rude and out of place. Maybe that's why he blows up at him. But he still saves him when he's in trouble, that's just the kind of person that Clark is. After a while they develop a tentative kind of friendship over the summer. Bruce isn't like anyone else that Clark knows, and he feels connected to him in all of his out of place-ness. His own feelings for the other take him by surprise, he only hopes that he can stomp them down before he ruins their friendship over them. - Smallville AU where Bruce spends the summers there and befriends Clark long before either of them become superheroes.

entry.title: Blinding Truth
entry.summary:
Author: Holdt

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 81,244Chapters: 12/?Kudos: 22

Summary: When Bruce Wayne's parents are assassinated for his reform proposals, his uncontrolled spirit-magic nearly kills him. Death-servant Clark abandons his sacred duty to save Bruce's life—condemning a spirit to shadow-eternity and losing his own sight in a failed purification ritual.Now forsaken by his people and able to see only magic and mortality, Clark must keep Bruce's wild power from burning him out while wetlands warriors train them both for revolution. Bruce will return to Gotham to destroy the old guard families who murdered his parents. But first, he has to be worth everything Clark sacrificed.

entry.title: Buried
entry.summary:
Author: RenaiRin

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 22,575Chapters: 3/8Kudos: 123

Summary: It was the same dream Clark had nonstop ever since he came back from the dead. Same, but different. Sometimes they were in the ruins of Gotham, the islands half-sunk underneath massive, thick, weaving dead branches and sporting a new jagged edge where the sea and the ports used to be that now toppled into a ragged cliff to dry chasms below. Sometimes they were in the cave, under the lake house, now that Clark knew where it was. Sometimes they were standing on the Gotham rooftops in the pouring rain, the clouded sky and darkness from the streets below snuffing out the gaslights that stubbornly remained this side of the Narrows, the black clinging to their bodies like ink. The scenery changed. What came next did not. ______ Or, Clark has recurring nightmares of non-conning Bruce post-resurrection, and Bruce offers CNC with himself as the solution.

entry.title: Bruce Wayne In Drag
entry.summary:
Author: NightTwink73

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 6,619Chapters: 2/2Kudos: 105

Summary: Heavily inspired by the song "Andrew in Drag", this fic follows Clark as he falls for who he thinks is a beautiful woman, only to find out that it's actually Bruce in drag. Now he has to figure out what to do about it.

entry.title: Who baby trap who?
entry.summary:
Author: Speechless_since_1998

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,243Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 182

Summary: “Bruce baby-trapped Clark.” Dick turned to the figure on the couch: Jason was staring at the photographs on the wall with a strange look, not exactly angry, but as if he'd just had an epiphany that had previously been denied him. It was because of that expression that Dick chose not to grab his escrima sticks and electrocute him. “What?” he asked, approaching the couch. Jason gestured towards the photos, his gaze feverish”Yeah, he baby trapped him! With you!” Dick really had no idea where that came from, and he really didn't want to know what was going through the mind of a painkiller addict. He just said,” Now it's not what happened…also, it's not biologically possible.”

entry.title: i'd tell them put me back in it
entry.summary:
Author: mitsukiris

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 4,965Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 77

Summary: i would do it again. if i could hold you for a minute, i'd go through it again.or: Clark has grown used to kryptonite over the years. Within the walls of his and Bruce's home, in Bruce's arms, he forgot that kryptonite could be used to hurt him. To the point that he isn't expecting Lex Luthor to use it against him, especially not after so many years being behind bars. Bruce has made it so safe for him that he isn't expecting kryptonite to hurt. To harm. Until it does. And when surrounded with the one thing he has grown out of fearing and into trusting, there is no other name he'd call but Bruce's. The thing is, will Bruce even hear him?

entry.title: this is not how i am
entry.summary:
Author: vibes_are_lost

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 2,246Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 42

Summary: Jason Todd (Red Hood) attacks Tim Drake (Red Robin) in Titans Tower but is stopped by Kon-El (Superboy) who calls in Clark Kent (Superman). The story encompasses the complex emotions within the combined Bat/Super family as they all grapple with the fact that Jason is alive and something is terribly wrong with him. Effects of coming back from the dead, maybe?

entry.title: boo-hoo, wayne!
entry.summary:
Author: naeveish

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 5,167Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 133

Summary: “I’m serious!” Hal rattles on. “You know those guys who spend their whole day being hyper-competent and intimidating but are secretly, like, hella submissive once the mask comes off? Because, sure, you’d expect Bats to be all rough and demanding, but what if—” “I really,” Clark interrupts, looking momentarily horrified by the direction this has taken, “really don’t think we should be discussing his potential for being... what you just said. Or anything else. Ever.”

entry.title: 𝑾𝑶𝑹𝑲𝑷𝑳𝑨𝑪𝑬 𝑽𝑰𝑶𝑳𝑨𝑻𝑰𝑶𝑵 // 𝑨 𝑺𝑼𝑷𝑬𝑹𝑩𝑨𝑻 𝑺𝑻𝑶𝑹𝒀
entry.summary:
Author: battinscnz

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 9,698Chapters: 2/?Kudos: 25

Summary: Clark Kent doesn’t trust billionaires - especially not Bruce Wayne, a man whose charm feels too precise to be anything but calculated. But when he’s assigned to interview him about Wayne Enterprises expanding into Metropolis, keeping his distance quickly becomes impossible, and what should be routine turns into something sharper, charged in ways Clark isn’t prepared for. Somewhere between tension and restraint, every glance lingers too long, every exchange cuts a little deeper, and control starts to slip in quiet, dangerous increments. Clark still doesn’t trust him - and maybe that’s the problem. Because the harder he tries to keep his distance, the more it feels like Bruce Wayne is already too close - and knows it.

entry.title: Am I making you feel Sick
entry.summary:
Author: fanofthegirl

Rating: Not RatedLanguage: EnglishWords: 102,834Chapters: 10/?Kudos: 707

Summary: Hal Jordan was dying long before a mission went wrong and his heart finally gave out. He was dying when he signed the divorce papers. Dying without making it anyone else’s problem. No one Noticed.Not Bruce. Not Clark. Not the Justice League. And Hal was fine with that because twenty months ago he signed away the right to have anyone worry about him. He would have kept it that way, too If he hadn’t burned himself out saving the world. If he hadn’t collapsed hard enough that everyone finally had to look. Now Bruce and Clark are hovering like they never spent nearly two years avoiding him. Acting like this is their burden to carry, like they didn’t already decide, once, that letting him go was easier than staying. Hal doesn’t understand it. There’s no cure. If Oa hasn’t found one, there’s no point in pretending otherwise. He’s made peace with dying. Bruce and Clark haven’t. They refuse to give up on him the way they gave up on the marriage. And that more than the poison in his blood or the ache in his chest is what hurts the most. Because Hal is still in love with them. And loving them while they fight to save him might be the one thing he can’t survive.

entry.title: Dead Reckoning Part Two
entry.summary:
Author: ChemShaw

Rating: ExplicitLanguage: EnglishWords: 29,711Chapters: 2/12Kudos: 2

Summary: Aven is living on borrowed time, his body harboring something intelligent, dangerous, and very much awake. As powerful corporations circle and a desperate mission pushes him deep into enemy territory, survival demands disguises, secrets, and impossible trust. Love offers brief sanctuary, even as it makes everything more fragile. Hunted, exposed, and running out of room to run, Aven must face the truth:staying alive may cost more than dying ever would...

entry.title: How Long Has This Been Going On?
entry.summary:
Author: bigmouthstrikes_again

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 45,881Chapters: 12/12Kudos: 260

Summary: “On the roof. I know what it was,” The boy said. “What was it? What did you see?” Clark said, glancing around. “It was Death I think?” He replied. “Death? What does that mean?” “Death was watching,” John began matter of factly, raising a hand to point behind Clark, “Death was watching and he was looking at you.” Quickly, Clark whipped his head to look in the direction John was pointing. He turned just quickly enough to see a wisp of black disappear behind a building. OR Batman stalks the hell out of Superman. Bruce Wayne is intrigued by Clark Kent. Superman is horrified by Batman. Bumbling reporter Clark Kent can’t seem to figure Bruce Wayne out. Identity mishaps occur. Idea from @lescrenti ‘s TikTok!New chapter every other day sorta :/

entry.title: Terraforming
entry.summary:
Author: ope-uh-oh (shortjacketlongskirt)

Rating: General AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,366Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 19

Summary: Batman’s eternal hubris has brought potential disaster upon Gotham. He and everyone he loves is on the verge of death, and uncovering how they got there is the only way the League can save them. During this process, Superman realizes something that’s been in front of him this whole time.

entry.title: Bird call
entry.summary:
Author: Bigcup_coffee3

Rating: Teen And Up AudiencesLanguage: EnglishWords: 1,881Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 53

Summary: It's supposed to be a normal patrol, Gotham was restless and the whole family had time to go on a patrol together, normal people bonding.Then they hear the sound, distant.Jason's distress call-JASONS. DISTRESS CALL.Crime alley suddenly became everyone's target.

entry.title: I knew it was real
entry.summary:
Author: Hasen

Rating: MatureLanguage: EnglishWords: 7,752Chapters: 1/1Kudos: 35

Summary: He didn't remember consciously making the decision to bite Kal. One moment he was all instinct, ready to shift in order to protect his mate and then he could taste Clark's blood. It was bitter on his tongue, the taste was probably due to the kryptonite entering his bloodstream. It didn't matter; his venom would eliminate all traces. After a few moments, the other stopped struggling; his venom was taking effect. Bruce barely had a few minutes of peace before his worst nightmare unfolded. Kal’s body shuddered and convulsed, a scream ripped his throat. The bite on his neck, which should have been healed by now, began to ooze. His veins began to bulge with a greenish color, and his hands tried to scratch the wound on his neck. This wasn’t the normal reaction expected from a mate. — When Clark is injured after a battle, Bruce gives him the Mating Bite in a desperate attempt to save his life. For shapeshifter mates, the bite's venom helps them heal; however, Clark's Kryptonian body seems to be allergic.
